translations.technical: Prisma mutation accessRequest.update is reachable without an auth check.
translations.plain_language_single: Changes to your data in {label} can be made without verifying who the user is.
translations.plain_language_multi: Changes to your data can be made in {N} places without verifying who the user is.

education.why_it_matters: Your database is where everything important is stored. Writes to it should only happen after the app has confirmed who's making the request.
education.what_could_happen: A malicious request — sent by a script, not a real user — could modify or delete records in your database.
education.what_to_do: Ask your developer to add an authentication check before this data operation.

business_impact: Data changes without identity checks can be exploited by automated abuse.
consequence: Records may be altered or deleted without a real user behind the action.

affected_nodes.detail: Prisma mutation accessRequest.update is reachable without an auth check.
affected_nodes.plain_language: Changes to your data in adminRouter can be made without verifying who the user is.

affected_nodes.detail: Prisma mutation accessRequest.update is reachable without an auth check.
affected_nodes.plain_language: Changes to your data in handler can be made without verifying who the user is.

remediation: Add getServerSession(), auth.check(), or similar before calling the mutation from the server action or API route.
